lore.english:
A humanoid weapon that was created from the collaboration of UFS and Demon Realm technology in a research facility of Task Force "G". Twin sisters born from an egg injected with genes of various species, Yuphie is the elder, and Sophie is the younger sibling. Among the injected genes, the traits of an Oni are most dominant, with vampiric powers also present. 

The elder sister, Yuphie, possesses special abilities focused on defense and healing, complemented by a quiet personality.  The younger sister, Sophie, is physically adept and specialized for offense, with an energetic nature. Although their roles seem clearly divided, it's said that when Yuphie truly unleashes her power, she displays a ferocity and brutality that even surpasses that of her younger sister.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Oni Sisters' Attack☆[-]
skills.description: Sophie throws fists at a single enemy and attacks 3 times.
skills.description_readable: Sophie throws fists at a single enemy and attacks 3 times.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]The Invincible Twins!![-]
skills.description:
Yuphie grants Sophie a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:580201]%)[-] [&DefUp].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:580201] turn(s)
Additionally grants a [&Shield] equal to [&Color_Cyan][V3:580202]%[-] of Max. HP.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:580202] turn(s)
When Yuphie's [&HP] is [&Color_Cyan]90%[-] or more, grants the same [&Buff] to an ally with the highest [&ATK].

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Super Oni Heal★[-]
skills.description: Yuphie & Sophie sisters remove [&DeBuff] from [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] and heal the targets by [&Color_Cyan][V3:580302]%[-] of their Max. [&HP].
skills.description_readable: Yuphie & Sophie sisters remove [&DeBuff] from [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] and heal the targets by [V3:580302]% of their Max. [&HP].

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]The Playful Oni Sisters♪[-]
skills.description:
On [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnStart], grants a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:580401]%)[-] [&HealTurn] to an ally with the lowest [&HP].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:580401] turn(s)
